nasb.text: But when the Pharisees heard that Jesus had silenced the Sadducees, they gathered themselves together.

esv.text: But when the Pharisees heard that he had silenced the Sadducees, they gathered together.

cnv.text: 法利賽人聽見耶穌使撒都該人無話可說，就聚集在一起。

ccb.text: 法利赛人听见耶稣使撒都该人无言以对，就聚集在一起。

csbs.text: 法利赛人听说耶稣使撒都该人哑口无言，就聚集在一起。
